title: Adamantium Real Textures Add-on
description: Add on for Adamantium Mod that adds realistic textures that match Patrix-style textures.
body:
Real Textures Add-on for Adamantium Mod [https://modrinth.com/mod/adamantium-mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/adamantium-mod)

Resource pack that adds realistic Patrix-style textures to the Adamantium ores.

![Realistic Textures Add-on for Adamantium Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb06c565b46596656d48caa8e038e871a5aa42db.png)

Credit to Patrix for the base textures and for creating one of the coolest texture packs I've seen
